text.message: how willing are you to trade bricks for sheep/ore here oj?
If it’s a good deal I’ll take it haha
In general I’ll trade if I have immediate use for something
(I had no immediate use for sheep or ore)
oj turning into a bot just ends my game :/
My phone died it’s back on sorry
let's not be too generous with oj though
We should all be generous I think
But just as a general principle
but the land of catan requires fine balance
Otherwise I can’t use the sheep
Until I get a wheat too
owing oj a nb kinda stinks
If I pull too far ahead u can back out
i mean if my first robber is end game yea lol
its just the 8 wood right now
that 5 is nothing to either of us
Where do i go to now
yea i cant keep nb then
im out of the game now
ive had 2 cards the whole game
But I’ll let black keep it haha
Just please don’t use it to back plow me :)
the game is not in a place where i can afford to trade back though
I thought that was for my settle but I was wrong
man this is a painful use of a yop
why are we making these mistakes
hes on 7 points why is the 5 blopcked
Everyone knows I’m getting road anyway might as well do it now
i have no more settles left...
you have 2 vps and best ows
Well you already have the 2 VPs right?
U can def army and 3 cities
you definitely have a better shot than me at least lol
I think we have a close game on our hands
i have mentally checked out of this game lol
It’s like yall have never played against a road player before lol
People get stuck on 7 all the time
no ore on board i dont believe
you have good ore and wheat
thats a big difference with the average road player
me and black are out lol
I know there’s political capital to pretend that lol
how tf have i settled 3 times before citying
so its just city and settle
well that sums up my game
I have a sheep if u want it
you took a awy the last glimmers of hope
how am i not supposed to mono
My phone could always die again
no it was deinfitely best thing
Dang blue really is gonna win
If no it’s already too late
maybe i dont have a knight
I’ll do it if u play knight
Otherwise I need a city this turn so no point
It is fairly classic catan woe is me I can’t win
